subject: [PATCH v7 1/6] sunrpc: add per-netns per-procedure call counts to svc_stat

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch adds per-network namespace (netns) and per-procedure call counts to the svc_stat structure in the sunrpc module. The existing global counters are not network-namespace-aware, which is a problem for the upcoming netlink stats interface that requires namespace-scoped statistics. To solve this issue, the patch introduces per-netns equivalents of the global counters and provides helper functions to manage them. The changes include adding a pointer array to struct svc_stat, incrementing the per-net counter alongside the global one in svc_generic_init_request(), and calling the alloc/free helpers from nfsd_net_init() and nfsd_net_exit().
